languages.text: "Мы будем молиться о сей милости денно и нощно, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}!"

languages.text: "We will pray day and night for this mercy, oHeavenly Envoy!"

languages.text: "Wir werden Tag und Nacht für diese Gnade beten, o himmlischer Gesandter!"
languages.original_text: "We will pray day and night for this mercy, oHeavenly Envoy!"

languages.text: "Nous prierons jour et nuit pour cette miséricorde, ô Envoyé céleste !
languages.original_text: "We will pray day and night for this mercy, oHeavenly Envoy!"

languages.text: "我们将日夜祈祷您的仁慈，天国的使者！"
languages.original_text: "We will pray day and night for this mercy, oHeavenly Envoy!"

languages.text: "Rezaremos día y noche por esta misericordia, ¡oh Enviado Celestial!"
languages.original_text: "We will pray day and night for this mercy, oHeavenly Envoy!"

languages.text: 「天の使よ、この慈悲のために昼夜を問わず祈りましょう！」。
languages.original_text: "We will pray day and night for this mercy, oHeavenly Envoy!"

languages.text: "Bu merhamet için gece gündüz dua edeceğiz, ey Yüce Elçi!"
languages.original_text: "We will pray day and night for this mercy, oHeavenly Envoy!"
